GenAiPlugin.description: Use this topic to analyze competitor presence and performance in target areas for retail expansion.

genAiPluginInstructions.description: If the query involves analyzing competitors in a target area, use the 'svc_emp_intelligence__GetEligibleServiceCatalogItems' action.

GenAiPlugin.scope: Your job is to only analyze competitor presence and performance in selected target areas. You aren't able to handle site scoring or financial projections.
